title: Markets update, crypto collapse, Russia/Ukraine endgame, state of the podcast
description:
0:00 Besties discuss the one-month hiatus

7:03 Markets update: Fed decisions, goals, macro factors, root causes

32:19 Earnings estimate skepticism, labor force, job openings

47:17 How startups should think about the next 18-36 months

56:20 Crypto collapse, next shoe(s) to drop

1:08:41 Russia/Ukraine endgame, escalation, scrutinizing US alliances, sanctions failing

1:33:12 Will 2024 be Biden vs. Trump? Could it be DeSantis vs. Newsom?

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the current state of markets, the crypto collapse, the Russia-Ukraine conflict, and the potential 2024 US presidential election. The hosts also share their thoughts on the next 18-36 months for startups and the impact of sanctions on Russia. The episode covers a wide range of topics, from macroeconomic factors to geopolitical tensions.

takeaways.text: Startups should prepare for a potential downturn
Crypto collapse is likely to have further repercussions
Sanctions on Russia may not be effective
The US presidential election in 2024 may be highly contested
The hosts are skeptical of earnings estimates
The labor force and job openings are key indicators to watch
The Russia-Ukraine conflict may escalate further

sentiment.notes: The hosts express caution about the current state of markets and the potential for further downturns. They also discuss the complexities of the Russia-Ukraine conflict and the potential implications for the global economy.

notable_moments.description: The hosts discuss the markets update and Fed decisions
The hosts discuss the crypto collapse
The hosts discuss the Russia-Ukraine conflict
